name: OpenClaw
description: OpenClaw is a multi-channel personal AI assistant that runs on your own machine and integrates with WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack, and 50+ other platforms. It offers persistent memory, system access, and full data ownership.

notes.text: After installation, configure your AI model and channels in /root/.openclaw/openclaw.json. API keys for LLM providers and messaging platform tokens must be added manually.
